_comment: pecli ligandmpnn config for the specificity-block RESAMPLE. Same NA-aware inverse folding as the binder block, but deeper sampling (100 sequences/backbone vs 5) to find the specificity-optimal sequence on a backbone that already passed the binder block. Paper: temperature 0.1, 100 seq/backbone. Only binder-block passers with minPAE < 1.25 enter here.
_total_sequences: batch_size * number_of_batches = 100 per backbone (paper scale). For a smoke test reduce to e.g. 10.
_entry_gate: Only backbones from binder-block passers with on-target minPAE < 1.25 are resampled here (paper). Enforce upstream when building the resample worklist.
